page.title: Setup Wizard
page.description: Complete runtime checks, provider setup, and gateway startup step by step.

welcome.body: This wizard will help you finish the minimum setup needed for the first launch.
welcome.hint: We recommend completing the steps in order to avoid integration issues later.

runtime.requirement: The current environment does not meet the requirements. Install the missing dependencies first.

errors.detectFailed: Environment detection failed. Please try again.

placeholders.name: Provider name
placeholders.apiKeyOllama: Ollama does not require an API key

errors.validateFailed: Provider validation failed. Please check the configuration.
errors.createFailed: Failed to create the provider. Please try again.
errors.missingRecord: The newly created provider record could not be found.

install.idle: Ready to start installation and startup.
install.skipExisting: OpenClaw is already installed. Skipping installation.

errors.startFailed: Failed to start the gateway. Please try again.

complete.title: Setup Complete
complete.description: The environment is ready. Go to the chat page to begin.
